# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [AnalysisClient Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-analysisclient.html): The core logic for processing dead code results and filtering findings. Architectural overview of the AnalysisClient domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-githubaction.html): The entry point and workflow orchestration layer for the GitHub Action environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [LifecycleManagement — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-lifecyclemanagement.html): Managing the startup and completion states of the Node.js process. Architecture documentation for the LifecycleManagement subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ReportingEngine Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-reportingengine.html): Handles the transformation of analysis metadata into user-facing documentation and feedback. Architectural overview of the ReportingEngine domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [TestingSuite Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-testingsuite.html): Contains unit and integration tests to ensure the reliability of the analysis and reporting logic. Architectural overview of the TestingSuite domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
- [UnitTesting — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-unittesting.html): Isolated tests for utility functions and logic. Architecture documentation for the UnitTesting subdomain (part of TestingSuite domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
